name: helixgen
description: Single-plugin marketplace for helixgen — natural-language → Line 6 Helix Stadium preset generation

plugins.name: helixgen
plugins.description: Generate Line 6 Helix Stadium .hsp presets from JSON or natural-language tone descriptions, and control a Stadium directly over the LAN (no editor app) — CRUD presets, back up/restore setlists to local files offline, and watch live streams. Bundles the /tone skill and the helixgen MCP server (code bundled, loaded from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}). The MCP server launches via `uv`, which auto-provisions the `mcp`, `click`, `pyzmq`, and `msgpack` Python packages into an isolated env — requires `uv` on your PATH.
